title: EJAE Golden Globes Speech: Rejection is Redirection
text: EJAE delivered an inspiring acceptance speech at the 2026 Golden Globes after winning Best Original Song for Golden from KPop Demon Hunters. Her speech emphasized the message Rejection is redirection, reflecting on her personal journey in the entertainment industry. The statement resonated with audiences and became a widely shared moment from the ceremony. EJAE spoke about the importance of perseverance and finding meaning in setbacks. Her win marked a significant moment for Korean-American representation in the music industry and major award ceremonies. The speech highlighted themes of hope and resilience that aligned with the film's core narrative.
